GentleCompanion

A calm space when your mind feels too loud.

A macOS app that doesn't push you to be productive — it simply stays with you until things feel lighter.

Download for macOSView on GitHub
SCROLL

Features

Everything you need
to feel a little lighter

☁️

Weather & Mood

Real-time weather-linked emotional copy. Sun, rain, snow, fog — every sky has its gentle interpretation. Global city search supported.

🍅

Pomodoro Focus

Liquid Glass styled timer. 25-minute deep focus sessions with completion stats and streak tracking.

🫁

Breathing Exercise

4-4-6-2 scientific breathing guide with 60fps particle animation, helping you slowly return to the present.

🎮

3 Mini Games

Pop bubbles to release stress, grow flowers in a garden, rhythm tapping — switch freely.

💬

Gentle Wall

Post feelings anonymously, browse by emotion tags, like each other's vulnerable moments. No judgment, only companionship.

🤝

Social Connection

Follow friends, private messages, Pomodoro leaderboard. Compare presence, not achievements.

☀️

23°

Hangzhou · Sunny

💧 55%💨 8.5 km/h
“Sunny in Hangzhou, the sun is whispering: you deserve to be loved today too.”

Weather & Mood

Weather Knows Your Mood

Not an ordinary weather forecast. Integrated with QWeather API, 7 emotions × 20 weather scenarios = bespoke gentle words, making every type of weather a reason to feel understood. Supports global cities, switch with a single click.

Sunshine ParticlesCloud DriftRaindropsSnowfallLightning FX
25:00
15 min25 min45 min
Clear inboxFinish that paragraphBreathe quietly

Pomodoro

Focus, Without Anxiety

The Pomodoro timer doesn't rush you — it stays with you. Liquid Glass styled timer that auto-detects macOS fullscreen mode. The focus stats panel records every moment you face yourself.

3Timer Phases
∞Quick Intents
60fpsParticles

Inhale 4s

●●○○

4-4-6-2 Breathing

Breathing

Breath, the Simplest Return

4s inhale, 4s hold, 6s exhale, 2s pause. A scientifically verified breathing rhythm, accompanied by 20 rising particles + breathing sphere animation, turning each breath into a visible gentle ritual.

4Phase Rhythm
60fpsCanvas Render
4Colors

Gentle Wall

Anonymous Gentle Wall

No judgment, no advice — only 'I hear you'. Every message is a moment of being seen.

Exhausted

“Today was really tiring, I don't want to do anything. Just want someone to say 'it's okay'.”

42
Anxious

“Tomorrow's presentation has had me sleepless for three days. But I'm still breathing, and that's enough.”

38
Lonely

“Many friends, but few I can really talk to. At least here, no one judges me.”

56
Bittersweet

“Got promoted. Should be happy, but the pressure makes me want to cry. Does anyone understand this contradiction?”

31
Empty

“No specific reason, just feeling hollow. Don't want to talk, don't want to be asked 'what's wrong'.”

49
Suppressed

“Everything looks fine on the surface, but a storm is raging inside. I don't want to scare anyone.”

67

Why I Built This

I didn't want another productivity app telling me to do more, focus harder, or optimize my life.

I wanted something that simply stays with you when everything feels overwhelming.

Something quiet. Something gentle.

Developer

Creator

张天成

Independent Developer · macOS & iOS Engineer

Believes technology can exist gently. Dedicated to building digital spaces that don't rush, don't judge — just quietly accompany. Every line of code carries care for the user's emotions.

SwiftUIAppKitCombineCore AnimationCloudKitREST API
🌱

No Rush

Not another productivity tool, but a space to slow down with you

🤲

No Judgment

Every emotion deserves to be seen and accepted

✨

Just Presence

Sometimes the best help is simply being there, quietly

Ready to feel
a little lighter?

GentleCompanion is free and open source. Available for macOS 14.0+.

Download for macOSStar on GitHub

macOS 14.0+ · MIT License · No data collection

You don't have to be okay right now.

Built for quiet minds.

Developer: 张天成
